method: Aggregate sales data by computing daily, weekly, and monthly sales totals and averages. Visualize these using a multi-line chart (V1), with one line for each time granularity to compare trends.
objective: Understand overall sales performance across different time dimensions, highlighting peaks, troughs, and seasonal patterns.

method: Correlate marketing campaign expenditure (spend) with daily sales performance using a scatter plot (V5). Campaigns can be highlighted and filtered for deeper insights into performance during specific time periods.
objective: Analyze how marketing efforts (spend) influence sales trends, helping optimize future campaigns for better ROI.

method: Overlay sales data with an external event calendar. Highlight holiday periods on a line chart (V1) to compare sales fluctuations during holidays versus regular days.
objective: Identify the impact of holidays and events on sales, helping plan inventory and marketing strategies during peak periods.

method: Calculate derived metrics (average daily sales, standard deviation, cumulative monthly sales) and create an area chart overlaid with a line chart (V2) to show cumulative sales alongside daily patterns.
objective: Gain deeper insights into sales variability and growth trends over time.

method: Break down sales data by monthly sales totals across product categories using a grouped bar chart (V3). Allow drill-down interactions to explore individual categories in greater detail.
objective: Analyze category-level contributions to overall sales trends, helping identify high-performing product categories.

method: Use a heat map (V4) to visualize sales patterns across days of the week and hours of the day, with intensity representing sales volume. Enable drill-down interactions to view sales within specific weeks or time slots.
objective: Identify spikes or anomalies in sales activity across time intervals, enabling better resource allocation and scheduling.

method: Compute average monthly sales per campaign for each product category. Use a stacked bar chart to visualize overlapping contributions of campaigns to category-wise sales.
objective: Understand how specific campaigns influence sales by category and help tailor marketing strategies for targeted segments.
